package rulefixtures

// scenario for len_string_for_empty_check: `len(s) == 0` used interchangeably with `s == ""`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule611PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario611Positive(records []Rule611PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
